wins: Revenue growth accelerated to 30% year-over-year and 10% sequential in Q2
U.S. commercial revenue, excluding strategic commercial contracts, climbed 70% year-over-year
U.S. commercial ACV closed was up 44% year-over-year and up 19% sequentially
Signed 27 deals worth $10 million or more and closed nearly $1 billion of TCV
Received a production contract from the Department of Defense Chief Digital and Artificial Intelligence Office
risks: Revenue from strategic commercial contracts declined to $9 million for the quarter
International commercial revenue declined 1% sequentially due to headwinds in Europe
Anticipate third quarter 2024 revenue from strategic commercial customers to continue declining
Uncertainty around the long-term viability of strategic commercial contracts
Potential challenges in maintaining revenue growth in international markets
